content: Hi, I'm Dana, a wedding planner from Los Angeles. I've just started a side project, an online course on wedding planning, and I'm really excited about it.
That sounds like a great idea! What inspired you to create an online course?

I've been planning weddings for years, and I realized that there are so many people who want to get into the industry but don't know where to start. I wanted to create a resource that could help them learn the skills they need to succeed.
That's really generous of you. Do you have any favorite wedding trends or styles that you like to incorporate into your planning?

I love doing destination weddings, especially in tropical locations like Hawaii or the Caribbean. And I'm also really into surfing, which is a great way for me to relax when I'm not planning weddings.
Destination weddings can be so much fun. And surfing is a great way to clear your head. Do you have any favorite surf spots?
Yeah, I love surfing in Malibu. The waves are always great, and it's such a beautiful spot. I've also been knitting a lot lately, which is a great way for me to unwind and be creative.
Knitting is a great hobby. Do you make things for yourself or for others?

I make things for both myself and others. I love making blankets and scarves for my friends and family. And I've also been working on a travel blog, where I write about my favorite destinations and experiences.
A travel blog sounds like a great idea. Do you have any upcoming trips or adventures planned that you're excited about?

Actually, I'm planning a trip to New Zealand next month, which I'm really looking forward to. I've always wanted to visit, and I'm excited to explore the country and try some new outdoor activities like hiking and biking.
I've also been thinking about starting a podcast, where I can talk to other wedding planners and industry experts about their experiences and advice.
A podcast is a great way to connect with others and share your knowledge. What do you think you'll talk about on your podcast?

I think I'll talk about all sorts of things, from wedding trends to business tips. I want to create a resource that's helpful and informative for my listeners. And I'm hoping to launch the podcast in the next few months, maybe by the end of the summer.
That sounds like a great plan. I'm sure your podcast will be really popular. Do you have any other hobbies or interests that you enjoy in your free time?
Yeah, I love trying new restaurants and foods. I'm a big foodie, and I love exploring different cuisines and flavors. And I've also been taking cooking classes, which has been a lot of fun.
